positive: A stylized, highly detailed astronomical creature—a celestial phoenix emerging from swirling nebula clouds. The design should be rendered in a minimalist, elegant woodcut or etching style, utilizing only deep indigo and brilliant gold accents against a neutral background. Focus on strong, bold silhouettes and intricate linework that follows the contour of the subject. The phoenix must be centrally composed and facing forward in a majestic, symmetrical pose. Include secondary elements like crescent moons, scattering stars, and wispy cosmic dust integrated seamlessly into the composition. High contrast, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, bokeh, jpeg artifacts, text, watermarks, signature, logo, words, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, poor quality, grayscale only, photographic, realism
